userId.description: The UID of the user who recorded the dose.

patientId.description: A unique identifier for the patient (e.g., KGL-882-01).

examDate.description: The date and time the exam was performed.

examType.description: The type of CT protocol (e.g., Head Routine).

drlExceeded.description: Whether the record exceeds national DRL limits.

AuditLog.title: Audit Log
AuditLog.description: A record of data modifications for security and accountability.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the action.

recordId.description: The ID of the record that was modified.

changes.description: Map of field names to changed values.

timestamp.description: Server-side timestamp of the audit entry.

/auditTrail/{logId}.description: Audit trail for all record modifications.
